scripts.infra:up: docker run -d --name coderank-redis -p 6379:6379 redis:7-alpine 2>/dev/null || docker start coderank-redis ; docker run -d --name coderank-postgres -e POSTGRES_USER=coderank -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=coderank -e POSTGRES_DB=coderank_dev -p 5432:5432 postgres:16-alpine 2>/dev/null || docker start coderank-postgres
scripts.infra:logs: docker logs coderank-redis & docker logs coderank-postgres
scripts.images:pull: docker pull python:3.12-slim && docker pull node:20-alpine && docker pull openjdk:21-slim && docker pull gcc:13
scripts.start: pnpm run infra:up && sleep 3 && pnpm run db:push && pnpm run dev
